query: SELECT u.id, u.full_name, u.username, u.role, GROUP_CONCAT(uc.cost_center_id) as cc_ids FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_cost_centers uc ON u.id = uc.user_id WHERE u.full_name LIKE '%مشرف%' GROUP BY u.id, u.full_name, u.username, u.role
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT u.id, u.full_name, u.username, u.role, GROUP_CONCAT(uc.cost_center_id) as cc_ids FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_cost_centers uc ON u.id = uc.user_id WHERE u.full_name LIKE '%مشرف%' GROUP BY u.id, u.full_name, u.username, u.role
